en: I walk down the ailse.
vi: Tôi đi xuống phía lối đi.

ipa: it looks so delicious

en: I pick up a package of ground beef.

en: The price is reasonable.

ipa: the price is reasonable

en: I can make hamburgers with it.

en: I put the package into the cart.

en: I have an apple and some bananas in my cart.

ipa: aɪ have æn ˈæp.əl and sɐm bəˈnɑːnəz ɪn mi kɑːt
